descriptionHtml:
💊 Prescription

Prescribed for: creative flow, relaxed energy, and standout expression.

Diagnosis: Overthinking. Creative blocks. Wearing the same safe fit too often.

Recommended dosage: Wear 3–5 times per week, especially during creative sessions, city walks, or when you need to reset your energy.

Best worn when: You’re in your own world — designing, drifting, or creating something new.

Style profile: artistic · expressive · slightly unbothered · quietly loud

Possible side effects: unexpected inspiration, compliments from strangers, elevated mood, repeat wear.

🎨 About the Art

A floating astronaut suspended in color — grounded in comfort, but mentally somewhere far beyond. The Lounger represents calm inside motion.

📦 Made to Order

This piece is created after purchase and shipped directly from our production partner. Production and shipping times may vary.

⚠️ Note

HatsRx prescriptions are for style and self-expression only.
